description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request. The workflow should have two jobs: one for macos-latest and one for ubuntu-latest. The macos job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.5, installs packages and Python modules, and compiles the code. The Linux job uses a matrix strategy to run for native_static and native_dyn targets, checks out the code in a container, installs dependencies, and compiles the code.
